# 💪  Google Analytics 4 Mastery in Minutes (Not Months)

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-02-08 14:30:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 510

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Remember when Google Analytics was actually easy to understand?

Then the new version, Google Analytics 4 (GA4) came along and
suddenly everything felt like rocket science...

Fortunately, there are many free analytics tools that strip away
all the complexity of GA4 and show you exactly what you need to
know! No PhD in data science required!

👉 16 Best Analytics Solutions for WordPress Users 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..z6_fN4qyCGiBwX5diC3mfaZRqn4zryt6CeWZ-1F4HsU )
 👈

#1 is the WordPress Analytics plugin that I use. #3 is BEST if
you want a non-WordPress standalone solution.

If you've been putting off dealing with GA4, this is your chance
to finally get a handle on your analytics - without the headache.

Learn to use analytics
----------------------

Want to learn how to use Google Analytics?

Then you’re at the right place!

Here is your ultimate guide 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..g5ttsYDuEnSzwGwrKkBgOaFx5dNbg6WJx67p36hY9Uw )
 to GA4 in WordPress for beginners.

Grow your business with a stunning site
---------------------------------------

Looking to create a new website or re-establish your existing
one?

You know a beautiful, modern site is important for attracting
visitors and turning them into customers...

...But you probably don't have time to struggle with WordPress
design tools or the budget to hire a fancy agency.

You can book a free consultation 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..dm47kIh55kj4ZdMfcxQIT0m_QD75c39qcL5TMYPzSGw )
with our team and see how we can help.

Talk soon,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
